name: printease-desk
description: PrintEase Desktop Linux release/update repo. Contains the real frontend source plus Electron desktop shell.

scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix frontend && npm ci --prefix desktop-shell
scripts.dev: npm run build:frontend && npm run dev --prefix desktop-shell
scripts.pack: npm run build:frontend && npm run pack --prefix desktop-shell
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:frontend && npm run dist:linux --prefix desktop-shell
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:frontend && npm run dist:win --prefix desktop-shell
scripts.dist:appimage: npm run build:frontend && npm run dist:appimage --prefix desktop-shell
